deployCommand: az deployment sub create --location eastus2 --template-file infra/main.bicep --parameters @infra/main.parameters.json --parameters sessionSecret=<generated-at-deploy-time>

findings.claim: Key Vault references require a managed identity when used from App Service app settings.
findings.detail: Initially flagged, then fixed by switching the app setting wiring to a direct @secure() sessionSecret parameter and a plain Application Insights connection string instead of Key Vault references.

findings.claim: Transport controls are hardened on App Service.
findings.detail: App Service enables httpsOnly, enforces minTlsVersion 1.2, disables FTPS, and restricts FTP basic publishing credentials.

findings.claim: SESSION_SECRET handling is complete for scaffold phase.
findings.detail: Initially flagged because a Key Vault secret resource was missing; fixed by removing the Key Vault reference pattern and passing sessionSecret as an @secure() parameter to App Service.

findings.claim: Module structure and cross-module wiring are consistent.
findings.detail: main.bicep wires the resource group, Key Vault, Log Analytics, Application Insights, App Service plan, and App Service modules consistently using module outputs.

findings.claim: Bicep schema validation passed and target scope is correct.
findings.detail: az bicep build succeeded for infra/main.bicep, and the template declares targetScope = 'subscription'.
Resource names and SKUs match the plan for App Service F1, Key Vault Standard, Log Analytics PerGB2018, and Application Insights workspace-based Basic.

findings.claim: WAF alignment is mostly present; runtime health behavior cannot be fully proven from IaC alone.
findings.detail: Infrastructure defaults align with the prepare plan, and App Service healthCheckPath is configured to '/', but endpoint correctness still depends on the deployed application.

checks.name: bicep build
checks.detail: az bicep build --file infra/main.bicep --stdout completed successfully.

checks.name: RBAC review
checks.detail: No App Service managed identity is defined (intentional F1 constraint), and key-vault.bicep grants the deployer Key Vault Secrets Officer and Key Vault Secrets User roles on the vault.

checks.name: scaffold warnings addressed
checks.detail: W-SESSION-SECRET is satisfied by the secure sessionSecret parameter, W-NO-ENGINES by WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION='~20', and W-HEALTH by appServiceHealthCheckPath='/' wired into App Service.

validationResult.proof: Bicep build passed; static review confirmed RBAC completeness for the chosen F1 App Service design and all scaffold-phase prereq warnings were addressed in IaC.
